and burn and destroy ever manufac-
turing plant, every wholesale house
would you think?


If that man, claiming to be a friend
Of yours. declaring himself to be

would you do to him?


If a man, merely to make capital

fuddling the voters and the legislat-
i've representatives to the point of
forcing the passage of a law which
sweeps from existence the entire
wholesale and manufacturing inter-
ests of your city, giving them the
sole alternative of moving their
plants to other cities actually favor
ed by such a bill-what are you go
ing to do?


If you find yourself at the inter-





takenly take the path which you later
mud to be leading you over a preci-
pice. are you going to continue to

Or will you turn back, acknowledge

OF EnI
themselves through following up the

railroad commission.


The time for plain speaking has
arrived. 1t is suicidal to remain
quiet longer.


The demagogucs and the politicians
have had their day. Now it is up to
The manufacturer and the wholesaler
and the merchant of Spokane to speak
out and save themselves from utter
financial ruin.


These words are not too strong.
Some OF the brightest minds in Spo-
kane business circles will tell you

mission lava law born and nursed

inhalation of the Spokane jobbing
trade.

into trap. The man whose blunder-
ing demagogism has come near to

merce Is Nelson w. Durham.


The F'rankenstein OF Spokane busi-
ness interests Is composed of Nc
Brideism and Durhamism.


In Mcbride the people of Spokane
purchased a gold brick


That gold brick was sold to them

form a theory into a conditions
man who, In the days to come, IL the

hgton.

cuse him of everything which savors

this man, l say, evolved a theory.


Notwithstanding the fact that he
